/data/data/com.termux/files/usr/bin/c++ -O2 -g -DNDEBUG -Xlinker --dependency-file=CMakeFiles/llama-gguf.dir/link.d "CMakeFiles/llama-gguf.dir/gguf.cpp.o" -o ../../bin/llama-gguf  -Wl,-rpath,/data/data/com.termux/files/home/build-gpu-adreno/bin: ../../bin/libggml.so.0.12.0 -lpthread ../../bin/libggml-cpu.so.0.12.0 ../../bin/libggml-base.so.0.12.0
